arts.ttl: Roma Eye Ajax’s Rensch: Negotiations Underway
arts.sum: Roma have set their sights on Ajax's promising young defender Devyne Rensch, with initial contacts already established between the two clubs. The 21-year-old Dutch right-back has caught the attention of the Giallorossi as they look to bolster their defensive options. The post Roma Eye Ajax’s Rensch: Negotiations Underway appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Ajax reject €5m bid from AS Roma for defender Devyne Rensch
arts.sum: AS Roma have officially seen a bid turned down by Ajax for Devyne Rensch, Voetbal International reports. The €5m offer was deemed too low for Ajax, although the Dutch giants…
